en: When I would heal Israel, the iniquity of Ephraim is revealed, and the evil deeds of Samaria; for they deal falsely; the thief breaks in, and the bandits raid outside.
zh: “我醫治以色列的時候，以法蓮的罪孽， 和撒瑪利亞的罪惡就顯露出來； 因為他們行欺詐， 小偷入屋偷竊， 強盜在外搶劫。

en: But they do not consider that I remember all their evil. Now their deeds surround them; they are before my face.
zh: 他們心裡並未想到， 我記得他們的一切罪惡。 他們所作的一切，現在都圍繞他們， 都在我面前。

en: By their evil they make the king glad, and the princes by their treachery.
zh: 他們以自己的惡行討王歡喜， 用自己的虛謊叫領袖快樂。

en: They are all adulterers; they are like a heated oven whose baker ceases to stir the fire, from the kneading of the dough until it is leavened.
zh: 他們全是犯姦淫的， 像一個被烤餅的人燒熱的火爐， 從摶麵，直到全團發酵的時候， 烤餅的人暫停使火發旺。

en: On the day of our king, the princes became sick with the heat of wine; he stretched out his hand with mockers.
zh: 在我們王喜慶的日子，領袖們因酒的烈性而生病， 王就與褻慢人聯手。

en: For with hearts like an oven they approach their intrigue; all night their anger smolders; in the morning it blazes like a flaming fire.
zh: 他們陰謀埋伏的時候， 心中燒得熱如火爐。 他們整夜抑制怒氣， 一到早晨，卻像發出火燄的火燃燒起來。

en: All of them are hot as an oven, and they devour their rulers. All their kings have fallen, and none of them calls upon me.
zh: 所有的人都熱如火爐， 吞滅他們的官長。 他們所有的君王都倒斃了， 他們中間沒有一人向我呼求。

en: Ephraim mixes himself with the peoples; Ephraim is a cake not turned.
zh: “以法蓮與外族混雜， 以法蓮是沒有翻過的餅。

en: Strangers devour his strength, and he knows it not; gray hairs are sprinkled upon him, and he knows it not.
zh: 外族人吞吃了他的力量， 他卻不知道； 他頭上滿是白髮， 他也不曉得。

en: The pride of Israel testifies to his face; yet they do not return to the LORD their God, nor seek him, for all this.
zh: 雖然以色列的驕傲當面指證自己， 他們卻不回轉歸向耶和華他們的 神， 也不因此尋求他。

en: Ephraim is like a dove, silly and without sense, calling to Egypt, going to Assyria.
zh: 以法蓮好像一隻愚蠢無知的鴿子。 他們向埃及求助，投奔亞述。

en: As they go, I will spread over them my net; I will bring them down like birds of the heavens; I will discipline them according to the report made to their congregation.
zh: 但他們去的時候，我要把我的網撒在他們身上； 我要把他們如同空中的飛鳥打下來。 我要按著他們會眾所聽見的，懲罰他們。

en: Woe to them, for they have strayed from me! Destruction to them, for they have rebelled against me! I would redeem them, but they speak lies against me.
zh: 他們有禍了，因為他們離棄了我； 他們遭毀滅，因為他們背叛了我。 我雖然想救贖他們，他們卻對我說謊。

en: They do not cry to me from the heart, but they wail upon their beds; for grain and wine they gash themselves; they rebel against me.
zh: 他們並沒有真心向我呼求， 只是在床上哀慟罷了。 他們為了五穀和新酒割傷 自己， 仍然悖逆我。

en: Although I trained and strengthened their arms, yet they devise evil against me.
zh: 我雖然鍛煉他們的手臂，使它們有力， 他們卻圖謀惡計攻擊我。

en: They return, but not upwards; they are like a treacherous bow; their princes shall fall by the sword because of the insolence of their tongue. This shall be their derision in the land of Egypt.
zh: 他們轉向巴力， 成了不可靠的弓。 他們的領袖因自己舌頭上的狂傲倒在刀下， 這在埃及地必成為被人譏笑的對象。”
